caption: Your privacy is your right. Right now your ISP can see what you visit, what you search, and what apps you use, and in many places that data can be sold or shared. Freedom encrypts your traffic so no one can monitor, throttle, or profit from your activity. It also unlocks access without borders when networks try to block websites or apps. And with built-in threat protection, Freedom blocks malware, phishing, and malicious links in real time while you browse, stream, and work. #privacy #digitalfreedom #dns #cybersecurity #mobilesafety
title: Freedom DNS - Privacy Is a Right
